  • Uses of MOChangeListener in org.snmp4j.agent

    Methods in org.snmp4j.agent with parameters of type MOChangeListener
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    DefaultMOServer.registerChangeListener(MOServer server, MOChangeListener listener, MOFilter moFilter)
    Register a single MOChangeListener with all objects matching the given filter in the specified MOServer.
    static void
    DefaultMOServer.unregisterChangeListener(MOServer server, MOChangeListener listener, MOFilter moFilter)
    Unregister a single MOChangeListener from all objects matching the given filter in the specified MOServer.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ChangeableManagedObject.addMOChangeListener(MOChangeListener l)
    Adds a MOChangeListener that needs to be informed about state changes of this ManagedObject.
    void
    DefaultMOTable.addMOChangeListener(MOChangeListener l)
     
    void
    MOScalar.addMOChangeListener(MOChangeListener l)
    Adds a MOChangeListener that needs to be informed about state changes of this scalar.
    void

    Removes a MOChangeListener from this ManagedObject.
